title: Detailed examination of a double-dividend case in a recent two-engine growth model
author: Hosoya
description: Review highlights·This paper examines in detail some of the results in the paper by Cheng et al. (2024), which is likely to become an important basic reference in environmental macroeconomics.·While Cheng et al. (2024) clarified the realization of a double dividend with respect to growth and the environment, the mechanism of their model is complex, with environmental degradation seen in some cases as judged by pollution emissions.·In this context, we use numerical analyses to explore their model in depth.
